title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
summary: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier
